mapper.select: SELECT * FROM arbitration_snapshot WHERE task_id=#{taskId} AND task_document_id=#{taskDocumentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO arbitration_snapshot(task_id, task_document_id, arbitrator_id, adopted_from, final_result, arbitrated_at) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{taskDocumentId}, #{arbitratorId}, #{adoptedFrom}, #{finalResult}, #{arbitratedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE arbitration_snapshot SET adopted_from=#{adoptedFrom}, final_result=#{finalResult}, arbitrated_at=#{arbitratedAt}, arbitrator_id=#{arbitratorId} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM arbitration_snapshot WHERE task_id=#{taskId} AND task_document_id=#{taskDocumentId}
